title: AI基础设施战争：从芯片到操作系统，AI竞赛进入生态时代
title_en: The AI Infrastructure War: From Chips to Operating Systems, the AI Race Enters Its Ecosystem Era
summary: 2026年7月第三周，AI产业的竞争焦点发生了根本性转变。苹果起诉OpenAI窃取芯片机密、台积电千亿美元赴美扩产、欧盟DMA打破Android AI壁垒、Apple Intelligence借阿里千问入华——这些看似独立的事件，共同指向一个核心趋势：AI竞赛已从模型能力之争，转向涵盖芯片、操作系统、硬件终端和市场准入的生态战争。
summary_en: In the third week of July 2026, the competitive focus of the AI industry underwent a fundamental shift. Apple sues OpenAI over chip secrets, TSMC invests $100B more in the US, EU DMA breaks Android's AI barriers, Apple Intelligence enters China via Alibaba's Qwen — these seemingly independent events point to a core trend: the AI race has shifted from model capability competition to an ecosystem war encompassing chips, operating systems, hardware, and market access.
